reviews.review_description:
I’m only writing a review due to an issue i have. My friend gifted me the supporter pack and i was very excited. I redeemed it and launched the game, only to see that it’s still locked???? I even restarted my headset and waited 5-10 minutes and even deleted and reinstalled the game. Just for it to STILL BE LOCKED. My friend bought it again for me, so she wasted $20 for nothing. I’m disappointed and frustrated. Her supporter pack works but mine isn’t. I also waited 24 hours and still it’s locked. I give up. so, PLEASE FIX THIS!! I would’ve contacted the creator/publisher themselves but there is no information about any socials. 

I only gave 3 starts because the game isss fun. But, clearly the game has issues/bugs and they need to fix them. I definitely don’t think the supporter pack is worth $10, but still it would be fun to ACTUALLY PLAY THE GAME. That’s my rant,hopefully the creator fixes this.

reviews.review_title: It makes you pay to play
reviews.review_description: You can only play 4 levels unless you pay 8 dollars. I think that is unfair because not everyone can pay that. Also the game barely updates, I cqnt even remember the last update this game had. The monsters are way too loud even if you turn down the monster volume. One star, would not recomend to a friend

I was so happy when I saw Jmancurly play this game. I thought there were no Backrooms vr games. So I downloaded it and played the same four levels over and over again. When I got bored of those levels I got the supporter pack. So I played the levels again and again. The creator is an idiotic sociopath. He/she could have made so much potential on this game. But they thought it would be better to waste money and time on making a failing knock-off GORILLA TAG GAME INSTEAD!!!!Now there are no updates all there is…Is a dying community and an abandoned game.

This game is so good, I’ve actually made a ton of friends on here and I used to play this game everyday, I even spent money on it!!! Yet I wish there was more, we haven’t got an update in about a year or 2 maybe even 3 idk, but I just want more, this game is so PEAK but I just want more updates or more levels…

reviews.review_title: The monster NEEDS TO HAVE ABILITIES
reviews.review_description:
The bacteria should have a abilitie to roar that makes a sound that makes you see were the hazmats are or make you faster. for kitty make it were you can teleport to a specific person or make it where you teleport to a spot in the map. for the smiley face guy make it were if they stare at you to long at him it will infect the victom to being the monster. only in infectoin tag and to not make it overpower it shoul
d only work on the first guy that is the monster and if they tag someone it will not give them the abilities.

Overall, this game is amazing. The running style is fun because you need to swing your arms in circles, there are cool cosmetics, and the game stays loyal to the original design of the monsters. It’s also cool how there is an infection game mode. I think I would’ve gotten bored extremely quickly if there wasn’t. My only problems are that the cosmetics are way too expensive and they took away A TON of maps, so now you have to pay for them. But definitely a recommendation.

I had an amazing time on this game with friends but when my friend was trying to purchase the supporter pack it said oops something went wrong. I got the support pack but my friend didn't even though he spent $20 on the supporter pack. Please if you can, fix this bug

developer_response.body: Hi kindly contact meta support regarding this. They will be able to help you with this. We don't have the ability to manage payments form our end. We just get confirmation whether a purchase was successful or not. Thanks for understanding.

reviews.review_title: You need to add this feature
reviews.review_description: You should add a feature in tag mode where when your a monster you can pick up peaple and bite there head off witch makes them infected or throw them or place them down. Just imagine running away but then you get grabbed and your head gets bit off!! Also there is a glitch where a clone of someone else spawns outside of the map but is infected so nobody can become a bacteria… anyways 5 stars great game

Thanks to the developers of the game please add a new backrooms movie update about new monsters and having a new weapon to defend yourself and it’s free to get in the shop which is called the electro baton. That’s it for the new celebrating backrooms movie. also, please add a new monster to the game.

Keeps saying they'll add "new levels" but they instead choose to promote their new crappy knockoff game just the same as the others, the game barely works properly and I constantly hear slurs whenever I join, overall I wish they'd do better it's disappointing to see I game I used to love so much go down the drain.

Overall there has been no more updates I’m not in their discord but I must say it seems they have abandoned the game and I wanted to play with my friend of course a new level we’ve speed runned the game more then well ten times or more I can’t count but pls update bro we need updates and I’ve been playing this game since it was early access and I bet it still is but pls update dawg 

Overall 5 stars don’t recommend if ur playing just for scariness unless u have supporter pack

This game was amazing in 2022 there was always new levels being made and the developer always updated on what he was doing now the devs left this game to make some gorilla tag slop game if the dev actually continued to work on this game this game would have been so good but instead what we have now is a abandoned game with a dying player base

reviews.review_title: Its just like the backrooms but funny
reviews.review_description: Noclip vr is a type of game that i love you have to move around it's fun you get to play with friends and the game is just fun there's a lot of game modes well three it's still cool yeah i broke my controller once on this game but i don't care it's still fun i played with one controller

I absolutely love this game I always play it whenever I get a chance since it doesn’t take ages to load into a public server and private server is also an option which is good the only issue I have is when an entity is about to get you there is no jump scare I think it would be wayyyyy better if there was a jump scare because it would feel more emerging into the game but other than that it’s an amazing game I recommend it😁😁

Even though I give him five stars they still don't ban people that glitch into walls or stop people from glitching themselves to where they cannot be tagged so I would like admin because every single day I hop on I see people glitching/ / hacking

For the love that is all holy, turn the sensitivity up. Or even put a slider to turn it up. This is the worst sensitivity in any game I have ever played in my 45 years of living. Also add more maps, PLEASE.

Would definitely recommend this game its a fun backrooms game that is played by using your arms in a circle motion. For over 3 years this game has been fun even at hard times for personal reasons. Great game awesome features but I do wish there were more updates. They say they will keep udating but never do. Also another thing is that when I join the game almost EVERY time I join a public lobby there's a 30 year old man crashing out on a 5 year old for stealing the key in lvl 2 💀. Please fix the age rating in general! But overall this game deserves a 4 star.
